headline: Ackman’s Pershing Square IPO Expected to Raise $5 Billion

headline: Why The Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Story Is Shifting As AI Jitters Meet Valuation Discipline
summary: Palo Alto Networks’ fair value estimate has shifted slightly from $205.96 to $206.14, a very modest adjustment that still matters if you are tracking entry points and risk. Street research links this kind of fine tuning to a broader reset in cybersecurity price targets as analysts debate AI related disruption, sector wide volatility, and how to weigh CEO share purchases against more conservative assumptions. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these moving targets and keep up with...
